anchor:
Data Platform Architect - Cloud Focus

*   10+ years experience designing and building large-scale data platforms.
*   Deep expertise in cloud environments (AWS, Azure, or GCP) - preference for AWS.
*   Strong background in data warehousing and data lake architectures.
*   Experience with modern data ingestion tools (e.g., Airflow, Fivetran).
*   Proficiency in Python and SQL required.  Spark experience a plus.
*   Leadership experience – ability to mentor and guide other engineers.
*   Responsibilities include defining platform strategy, ensuring scalability, and optimizing performance.
*   Remote position, open to candidates in US and Canada.

positive.summary: Data Platform Architect with 12+ years of experience designing and building scalable, cloud-based data platforms. Deep expertise in AWS and leading data engineering teams.

work_experience.description: Developed and maintained data pipelines for processing large volumes of order data using Python, SQL, and Spark. Implemented data quality checks and monitoring systems.

Led the design and implementation of a new data platform on AWS, incorporating Redshift, S3, and Airflow. Responsible for platform scalability, performance optimization, and data governance. Mentored a team of 5 data engineers.

projects.name: Real-time Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: Developed a real-time analytics dashboard using AWS Kinesis, Redshift, and Tableau to monitor key business metrics.

projects.name: Data Lake Automation
projects.description: Automated the ingestion and processing of data into a data lake on S3 using Airflow and Python.

Responsible for the design, implementation, and maintenance of Azure AD environments. Focused on security best practices, including Conditional Access policies, MFA enforcement, and identity governance.

projects.description: Implemented and optimized Conditional Access policies to enforce MFA and restrict access based on device health and location, enhancing overall security posture.

certifications: Microsoft Certified: Identity and Access Administrator

anchor: Seeking a seasoned Android Engineering Manager to lead a team of 5-7 mobile engineers focused on building and maintaining our core consumer-facing Android application. Must have 7+ years of experience in Android development, with at least 3 years in a leadership role. Strong proficiency in Kotlin is essential, and familiarity with Jetpack Compose is highly desired. Experience with Firebase (Authentication, Firestore, Cloud Messaging) a significant plus. We need someone who can drive technical strategy, mentor engineers, and ensure code quality through rigorous testing and code reviews – experience with CI/CD pipelines (e.g., Bitrise, Jenkins) and automated testing frameworks (Espresso, UI Automator) is crucial. This is a full-time, hybrid role (3 days/week in our NYC office), and we’re looking for someone available to start within 8 weeks. No visa sponsorship available.

positive.summary: Highly experienced Android Engineering Manager with 8+ years in mobile development, including 4 years leading teams. Proven ability to build high-quality Android applications, mentor engineers, and drive technical strategy. Expertise in Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, and Firebase.

work_experience.description: Developed key features for the Property Finder Android app, including search, map integration, and listing details.  Implemented Firebase Authentication and Cloud Messaging for user management and push notifications.  Mentored junior engineers on Android best practices.

Lead a team of 6 Android engineers responsible for developing and maintaining the Talabat Rider app.  Drove the adoption of Jetpack Compose, significantly improving UI development efficiency. Implemented CI/CD pipelines using Bitrise for automated testing and deployment. Focused on performance optimization and feature delivery.

anchor:
Hey team - need some help finding a Data Infrastructure Reliability Engineer! 👀 Focusing more on ops/stability than building new pipelines.

*   Looking for 3-5 yrs exp, solid understanding of Kafka/Spark/dbt ecosystems (not necessarily expert-level dev).
*   Big focus on monitoring, alerting, and troubleshooting data flows – ideally someone with Prometheus/Grafana or similar experience.
*   Cloud experience a plus (Azure preferred this time!), but less critical than the reliability skills.
*   US-based, remote ok.
*   FT, direct.
*   Let's chat if you've got folks who love keeping things running smoothly! 🚀

positive.summary: Data Infrastructure Engineer with 4 years of experience specializing in data reliability, monitoring, and troubleshooting across various data pipelines. Proven ability to ensure data flow stability and performance.

work_experience.description: Developed and maintained data pipelines for various business units. Focused on optimizing data flow and improving data quality.  Troubleshot and resolved data-related incidents, ensuring minimal downtime.

Responsible for ensuring the reliability and performance of critical data pipelines using Kafka, Spark, and dbt. Implemented comprehensive monitoring and alerting systems using Prometheus and Grafana to proactively identify and resolve issues.

projects.name: Pipeline Performance Dashboard
projects.description: Developed a Grafana dashboard to monitor the performance of key data pipelines, providing real-time insights into latency, throughput, and error rates.

projects.name: Automated Alerting System
projects.description: Implemented an automated alerting system using Prometheus and Alertmanager to proactively notify stakeholders of critical data pipeline issues.

negative.summary: Senior Security Engineer specializing in Identity Governance and Administration (IGA) with 8+ years of experience. Proven ability to design, implement, and maintain robust IGA solutions, focusing on policy enforcement, access certification, risk mitigation, and automation in complex hybrid and cloud environments. Expertise in SailPoint and Okta.

work_experience.job_title: Security Engineer - Identity and Access Management
work_experience.description: Managed and enhanced Swvl's IAM infrastructure, including user provisioning, authentication, and authorization. Developed Python scripts to automate user account lifecycle management and improve security posture.

Responsible for the design, implementation, and maintenance of SABB's IGA program, utilizing SailPoint and Okta for access governance, risk mitigation, and compliance. Implemented automated access certification workflows, reducing manual effort by 40%.

projects.name: Automated Access Review Script
projects.description: Python script to automate access review process in SailPoint, identifying and escalating access violations.

projects.name: Okta Multi-Factor Authentication Enhancement
projects.description: Implemented adaptive MFA policies in Okta based on user risk scores and device health, enhancing security without impacting user experience.
